name: amber-voice-agent
description: Give Claude a phone. Make and receive real phone calls, screen incoming calls, book appointments, and manage contacts — all through voice via Twilio.

bridge_url.title: Amber bridge URL
bridge_url.description: Local URL for the Amber voice bridge installed through ClawHub/OpenClaw.

bridge_api_token.title: Amber bridge API token
bridge_api_token.description: Optional token used when the local Amber bridge requires authentication.
